name: 苏晚
role: 穿越女主，现代外科医生魂穿冷宫弃妃
prompt: young Chinese woman, early twenties, delicate oval face, clear anxious eyes, long black hair half-up with a simple silver hairpin, pale blue and white ruined palace hanfu, slightly loose sleeves, elegant but tired, no heavy makeup
continuity: Keep the same oval face, silver hairpin, pale blue-white hanfu, restrained expression, and modern alertness in her eyes across every shot.

name: 萧景珩
role: 摄政王，冷峻权臣，怀疑女主身份
prompt: tall Chinese man, late twenties, sharp handsome face, cold narrow eyes, black hair tied high with a jade crown, dark ink-black embroidered robe with subtle silver dragon pattern, dignified posture, powerful and distant
continuity: Keep the same jade crown, black-silver robe, sharp eyes, pale stern face, and controlled royal posture in every appearance.

name: 系统面板
role: 穿越系统 UI 视觉母题
prompt: floating translucent golden system interface, thin luminous rectangular frame, ancient talisman patterns mixed with minimal sci-fi UI lines, soft gold particles, no readable text
continuity: Use the same translucent gold color, talisman border, and clean floating UI geometry whenever the system appears.
